title: MKON-035 A story about a playhood friend I liked being taken down by a super strong transfer student Hikaru Minazuki
description: Hikaru with her childhood friend Jun. Jun was quick to quarrel, but his roots were kind, and Hikaru liked Jun's place, and the two had both feelings. One day, a strong transfer student called Goriki arrives. Jun, who was out of luck, challenges his strength because he urged Hikaru as soon as he came. However, even Jun, who was the strongest in school, is not as strong as his strength and is made bumpy. "Ku ... shit ... Hikaru, don't touch it ... Stop it !!" BSS (I liked it first) work.
